user_query: Have I received any emails in the last 7 days? List sender and subject.

plan.query: Have I received any emails in the last 7 days? List sender and subject.
plan.reasoning: The only available agent that can access email information is the graph agent, which can retrieve emails from Microsoft 365. I will use it to fetch the required email details.

steps.task: Retrieve a list of emails received in the last 7 days, including the sender and subject for each email.

plan.synthesis: Present the list of emails from step 1, showing the sender and subject of each email.

invoked_agents.input: Retrieve a list of emails received in the last 7 days, including the sender and subject for each email.
